Template Gallery

Oak Park AI Hub · generated 2026-05-01 · follow code blindly

OPC — Oak Park Construction
TIP OF THE WEEK
FORMAT-010
Weekly educational post. Explains one construction/renovation concept with a stat and a step-by-step list. The most common OPC template.
slide 1 / 5
ILLUSTRATED
FORMAT-012
Same 5-slide structure as Tip, but with context image panels on the list and tip slides. Use when you have a relevant photo to show alongside the steps.
slide 1 / 5
CUTOUT
FORMAT-014
Same structure again, but designed for background-removed (cutout) images — floating person or product on a brand background. Best when NanoBanana cutout of Mike or a product is available.
slide 1 / 5
PROGRESS / BEFORE-AFTER
FORMAT-011
Project update posts. Shows current stage, what's done, what's next, and the team. Needs real project photos — placeholders show where photos go.
slide 1 / 5
NEWS — Brazil + USA
WHO IS THIS PERSON? — QUEM É ESSA PESSOA?
FORMAT-020
Profile carousel for any public figure: politician, religious leader, influencer. Cover: hook sentence → person sticker → air-quote → CTA. Slides: bio grid, quote, law they passed (with gov source label), PAC/funding money, network map, controversies. Works for Brazil and USA niches.
slide 1 / 6
QUEM DECIDIU ISSO?
FORMAT-002
Brazil political breakdown. 'Who actually decided this?' — traces a law, tariff, or policy back to the person who voted/approved it. Uses the native Brazil builder with dark + Canário yellow brand.
slide 1 / 5
VERIFICAMOS / A CONTA
FORMAT-013A/B
Brazil fact-check or institutional source carousel. VERIFICAMOS = debunking a viral claim. A CONTA = tracing who should have paid or who benefited. Uses the shared template builder with Brazil colors.
slide 1 / 5
THE CHAIN
FORMAT-016
USA bilingual carousel — same builder as Brazil shared, but with USA gold/amber colors. Traces a systemic issue step by step (chain of decisions). EN text primary, no PT required.
slide 1 / 5
